title: Speculative Decoding + KV Cache Offload Evaluation

tier2_ngram_speculation.note: Ngram speculation SLOWER than baseline due to verification overhead with enforce_eager=True. Acceptance rate too low for general text.

tier2_draft_model.reason: Qwen2.5-7B vocab_size=152064 != Qwen2.5-1.5B vocab_size=151936. vLLM 0.6.4 assertion error in spec_decode_worker._vocab_size.

tier4_kv_quantization.note: FP8 KV gives ~41% more KV cache blocks (2x theoretical, minus overhead). But throughput is LOWER due to XFormers backend fallback (FlashAttention-2 doesn't support FP8 KV in this version).

kv_offload_analysis.kv_config: 28 layers x 4 KV heads x 128 head_dim x 2 (K+V) x 2 bytes (bf16)
kv_offload_analysis.offload_cliff: ALL context lengths are disk-bottlenecked at 1.6 GB/s. Even seq=512 (28MB KV) limits to 59 tok/s vs GPU's 1806 tok/s.

key_findings.primary_finding: Speculative decoding does NOT reduce effective KV cache reads per output token in standard attention architectures. The verification step reads the FULL KV cache regardless of speculation count.
detailed_findings: 1. Ngram speculation (n=3,5) is 18-40% SLOWER than baseline autoregressive decode on H100, due to verification overhead exceeding acceptance benefit for general text prompts.
2. Draft model speculation is blocked by vocab size mismatch in the Qwen2.5 family (7B: 152064 vs 1.5B/0.5B: 151936).
3. KV offload to disk is bandwidth-limited at ALL context lengths. At 1.6 GB/s seq read, even 512-token context is 30x slower than GPU decode.
4. FP8 KV quantization provides ~41% more KV cache blocks but with throughput penalty (XFormers fallback, no FlashAttention FP8 support in vLLM 0.6.4).
5. For KV offload to be viable, disk bandwidth must exceed KV_size/target_latency. For 10ms decode @ 8K context: need 44.8 GB/s (requires HBM-to-host fabric, not NVMe).
key_findings.architectural_insight: Speculation reduces decode STEPS but not KV reads PER STEP. Each verification pass reads full KV for all speculative positions. Net: ~1 full KV read per output token regardless of speculation.
potential_fixes: Tree-attention verification that only loads KV for accepted token positions
KV cache streaming/paging that shares reads across speculative positions
Prefix caching with LMCache to avoid re-reading shared KV prefix from disk
HBM-speed storage tiers (CXL memory, persistent memory) instead of NVMe

success_criteria_evaluation.primary_30pct_nvme_reduction: FAIL — Speculation does not reduce NVMe reads. Architectural limitation.
success_criteria_evaluation.secondary_3x_combined_offload: PARTIAL — FP8 KV gives 1.4x more blocks, but speculation provides no additional benefit for offload.
success_criteria_evaluation.secondary_cartridge_acceptance: NOT TESTED — Blocked by disk space and draft model incompatibility.
success_criteria_evaluation.negative_result_documented: YES — Verification reads all KV regardless of speculation.
